| Mobile root cached session gating | `apps/mobile/app/_layout.tsx`, `apps/mobile/src/shared/api/__tests__/app-screen-contract.test.ts`, `docs/codex/08_FILE_COMPLETION_LOG.md` | Verified PASS | RED `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/mobile run test -- src/shared/api/__tests__/app-screen-contract.test.ts --runInBand` failed because cached authenticated sessions could fall straight into `OFFLINE` without rechecking email verification, onboarding, or MFA gate status. GREEN targeted rerun passed with 12 app screen contract tests. Full mobile verification passed with 34 suites and 241 tests. | Root bootstrap fallback now routes cached sessions through `offlineStatusFromCachedSession()`: unverified users stay behind `VERIFY_EMAIL`, onboarding-incomplete users stay behind `ONBOARDING`, MFA-required sessions return to auth, and only fully ready cached sessions can render the offline app shell. |

## 2026-07-04 Mobile Root MFA Cache Persistence Guard

| Area                              | Path                                                                                                                                      | Status        | Verification                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| --------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |

Full mobile test passed with 34 suites and 241 tests. | Root bootstrap now persists `mfaRequired` inside the safe cached session snapshot. Network-fallback sessions can no longer lose MFA-required state before `offlineStatusFromCachedSession()` decides whether to render the offline app shell or return to auth. |

| ----------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |

GREEN targeted rerun PASS with 8 staging-smoke tests. Combined database proof/evidence tests PASS with 23 tests. `corepack pnpm run test:root-scripts` PASS with 237 tests. `corepack pnpm run check:scripts` PASS. `corepack pnpm run format:check` PASS. `git diff --check` PASS. | Staging smoke proof now rejects base URLs with embedded credentials and treats response headers such as `set-cookie`, `authorization`, API keys, refresh/session tokens, JWTs, or email-like values as unsafe, so no-secret smoke evidence cannot pass when the deployed readiness endpoint exposes raw auth data. |

## 2026-07-04 GitHub Actions pnpm Setup Guard

| Area                              | Path                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Status        | Verification                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| --------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| GitHub Actions package-manager CI | `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, `.github/workflows/deploy-admin.yml`, `.github/workflows/deploy-api.yml`, `.github/workflows/mobile-build.yml`, `.github/workflows/release.yml`, `.github/workflows/security-scan.yml`, `scripts/quality/check-external-integrations.mjs`, `scripts/quality/check-external-integrations.test.mjs`, `docs/codex/08_FILE_COMPLETION_LOG.md` | Verified PASS | RED `corepack pnpm run check:external-integrations` failed because 11 `pnpm/action-setup` steps duplicated `version: 10` while root `package.json` already declares `packageManager: pnpm@10.0.0`, matching the GitHub Actions `ERR_PNPM_BAD_PM_VERSION` failure. GREEN `node --test scripts\quality\check-external-integrations.test.mjs --test-name-pattern "pnpm version"` PASS. GREEN `corepack pnpm run check:external-integrations` PASS. GREEN `corepack pnpm run test:root-scripts` PASS with 225 tests. GREEN `corepack pnpm run format:check` PASS. | GitHub Actions now rely on the root `packageManager` declaration as the single pnpm version source and the external integration preflight rejects future duplicated `with.version` settings in `pnpm/action-setup`, preventing CI/release/security workflows from failing before install. |

| Area                                | Path                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Status        | Verification                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| GitHub Actions native install guard | `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, `.github/workflows/deploy-admin.yml`, `.github/workflows/deploy-api.yml`, `.github/workflows/mobile-build.yml`, `.github/workflows/release.yml`, `.github/workflows/security-scan.yml`, `scripts/quality/check-external-integrations.mjs`, `scripts/quality/check-external-integrations.test.mjs`, `docs/codex/08_FILE_COMPLETION_LOG.md` | Verified PASS | RED `corepack pnpm run check:external-integrations` failed because six workflows still ran `pnpm store status`, matching the GitHub Actions `ERR_PNPM_MODIFIED_DEPENDENCY` failure after valid frozen installs of native postinstall packages such as esbuild/workerd. GREEN `node --test scripts\quality\check-external-integrations.test.mjs --test-name-pattern "pnpm store status"` PASS. GREEN `corepack pnpm run check:external-integrations` PASS. | CI workflows now rely on `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` for dependency consistency and the external integration preflight rejects future `pnpm store status` workflow steps that can falsely fail after native package postinstall scripts. |

| CI/Turbo lint and mobile lint | `scripts/dev/run-with-corepack-pnpm.mjs`, `scripts/dev/run-with-corepack-pnpm.test.mjs`, `apps/mobile/app/(auth)/verify-email.tsx`, `apps/mobile/src/shared/styles/clean-fintech-screens.tsx`, `apps/mobile/scripts/expo-local-android-debug-build.mjs`, `apps/mobile/scripts/expo-local-android-debug-build.test.mjs`, `apps/mobile/scripts/expo-local-android-production-build.mjs`, `apps/mobile/src/features/profile/api.ts`, `apps/mobile/src/shared/styles/__tests__/clean-fintech-theme.test.ts`, `docs/codex/08_FILE_COMPLETION_LOG.md` | Verified PASS | RED GitHub Actions CI reached `pnpm lint` and failed because the generated corepack shim recursively intercepted Turbo package `pnpm` calls in CI, then local `corepack pnpm run lint` exposed mobile lint blockers. GREEN `node --test scripts\dev\run-with-corepack-pnpm.test.mjs` PASS. GREEN `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/mobile lint` PASS. GREEN `corepack pnpm run lint` PASS. GREEN `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/mobile typecheck` PASS. GREEN `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/mobile test -- clean-fintech-theme.test.ts --runInBand` PASS with 131 tests. GREEN `corepack pnpm run test:root-scripts` PASS with 226 tests. GREEN `corepack pnpm run format:check` PASS. | The Unix pnpm/corepack shim now removes its own shim directory before falling back to the CI-provided pnpm/corepack binary, preventing recursive shim failures. Mobile lint now documents existing async ref and string-fixture exceptions at the narrow file level, and the profile raw-account regex no longer uses an unnecessary escaped hyphen. |

The workflow now still blocks real value-shaped secrets such as DB URLs, private keys, EAS/GitHub/Slack token shapes, and secret-name assignments while allowing policy/guard identifier names. |

## 2026-07-04 API Upload Idempotency Checksum Conflict Guard

| Area                                      | Path                                                                                                                                      | Status        | Verification                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ----------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct upload idempotency replay conflict | `services/api/src/routes/uploads.routes.ts`, `services/api/tests/mobile-uploads-contract.test.ts`, `docs/codex/08_FILE_COMPLETION_LOG.md` | Verified PASS | RED `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api test -- mobile-uploads-contract.test.ts` failed because same-key direct upload retries with different bytes returned the original upload as 200. GREEN rerun PASS with 26 files and 75 tests. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api typecheck` PASS. `git diff --check` PASS. | `/api/v1/uploads/direct` now compares the computed SHA-256 checksum during idempotent replay checks, rejects same-key retries whose file bytes differ with `UPLOAD_IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT`, and keeps the conflict response free of raw idempotency keys, user identifiers, financial markers, and token markers. This does not prove deployed R2/Cloudflare runtime upload gates. |

## 2026-07-04 API Upload R2 Runtime Adapter

| Area                        | Path                                                                                                                                      | Status        | Verification                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| --------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct upload R2 put/delete | `services/api/src/routes/uploads.routes.ts`, `services/api/tests/mobile-uploads-contract.test.ts`, `docs/codex/08_FILE_COMPLETION_LOG.md` | Verified PASS | RED `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api test -- mobile-uploads-contract.test.ts` failed because a runtime `UPLOADS_BUCKET` binding did not receive uploaded bytes. GREEN rerun passed with 26 files and 77 tests after adding R2 `put` and delete handling. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api typecheck` PASS. | `/api/v1/uploads/direct` now writes upload bytes to the Cloudflare `UPLOADS_BUCKET` binding when present, falls back to in-memory blobs for local/no-R2 tests, deletes the R2 object when the attachment is deleted, and keeps storage keys/R2 URLs out of API responses. This code path still requires real Cloudflare R2 bucket provisioning and runtime binding evidence before the R2 release gate can pass. |

## 2026-07-04 API Upload Content Proxy

| Area                            | Path                                                                                                                                      | Status        | Verification                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Upload API content stream proxy | `services/api/src/routes/uploads.routes.ts`, `services/api/tests/mobile-uploads-contract.test.ts`, `docs/codex/08_FILE_COMPLETION_LOG.md` | Verified PASS | RED `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api test -- mobile-uploads-contract.test.ts` failed with 404 for `GET /api/v1/uploads/{attachmentId}/content`. GREEN rerun PASS with 26 files and 80 tests. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api typecheck` PASS. `corepack pnpm run format:check` PASS. `git diff --check` PASS. | `/api/v1/uploads/{attachmentId}/download` now returns an API proxy URL instead of an `r2://` storage key, and `/api/v1/uploads/{attachmentId}/content` streams in-memory or R2-backed uploaded bytes with privacy headers. Real Cloudflare R2 provisioning/binding evidence and DB-backed upload metadata remain separate release gates. |

| ------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |

This opens the required app-level wiring path for a DB-backed uploads repository while preserving the existing default in-memory/R2 route handler until a DB repository is implemented and verified. |

GREEN rerun PASS with 27 files and 82 tests. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api typecheck` PASS. `corepack pnpm run db:validate` PASS. `corepack pnpm run release:database-evidence` PASS. `corepack pnpm run check:external-integrations` PASS. `corepack pnpm run clean:junk` removed 2.1 MB generated cache/build artifacts. | Added a Neon-backed uploads repository that persists direct upload metadata in `public.attachments`, stores file bytes through `UPLOADS_BUCKET.put`, keeps storage keys/R2 URLs out of API responses, and lets the app gateway auto-select it when a DB URL is present. This reduces avoidable auth failures and keeps first-run app flows aligned with the server's normalized email contract. |

GREEN targeted rerun PASS with 2 tests. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api exec vitest run tests/variable-expenses-db-repository.test.ts tests/mobile-variable-expense-contract.test.ts --passWithNoTests`: PASS, 2 files and 4 tests. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api run typecheck:strict`: PASS. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/api run test`: PASS, 27 files and 88 tests. `corepack pnpm run db:validate`: PASS. | Added an additive DB migration for `refund_amount` and `last_refund_idempotency_key`, updated server-authoritative daily-budget/payroll recalculation SQL to use active variable expense net amount after partial refunds, and updated the Neon variable expense repository response mapping so mobile/API receives correct refund and net spend values without exposing owner identifiers. Real Neon migration execution and staging smoke remain release gates. |

## 2026-07-05 Mobile Android E2E Local Build Wrapper Hardening

| Area                                     | Path                                                                                                                                                            | Status                                         | Verification                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ---------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Mobile Android E2E local build hardening | `apps/mobile/scripts/expo-local-android-debug-build.mjs`, `apps/mobile/scripts/expo-local-android-debug-build.test.mjs`, `docs/codex/08_FILE_COMPLETION_LOG.md` | Verified partial PASS; APK build still BLOCKED | RED `node --test apps\mobile\scripts\expo-local-android-debug-build.test.mjs` failed because the wrapper did not run `:expo-modules-core:configureCMakeDebug[x86_64]` before `assembleDebug`, did not retry once after a Windows CMake configure failure, and did not create object-output parent directories from `build.ninja`. GREEN rerun PASS with 7 tests. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/mobile typecheck`: PASS. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/mobile format:check`: PASS. `git diff --check`: PASS. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/mobile run build:e2e:android:local-debug`: FAIL. | The local Android E2E wrapper now explicitly configures `expo-modules-core`, repairs CMake output directories, retries that configure once on Windows, and parses `build.ninja` object outputs to create deeper parent directories. The actual APK gate remains blocked on this Windows machine by `ninja: error: manifest 'build.ninja' still dirty after 100 tries` in `expo-modules-core`; further attempts should move to WSL/CI/EAS native build evidence or a shorter real checkout path instead of stacking more wrapper retries. Generated Android build/cache artifacts were cleaned after verification-heavy runs. |

## 2026-07-07 CI Corepack pnpm Shim Fallback

| Area                                         | Path                                                                                                                            | Status                              | Verification                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| -------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| GitHub CodeQL pre-build package manager shim | `scripts/dev/run-with-corepack-pnpm.mjs`, `scripts/dev/run-with-corepack-pnpm.test.mjs`, `docs/codex/08_FILE_COMPLETION_LOG.md` | Verified PASS with release blockers | RED `node --test scripts/dev/run-with-corepack-pnpm.test.mjs`: FAIL because the Unix `corepack` shim did not fallback to an already installed `pnpm` after removing the repository shim directory from `PATH`. GREEN targeted rerun PASS after adding the same installed-pnpm fallback used by the Unix `pnpm` shim. `node --test scripts/quality/check-package-manager-scripts.test.mjs scripts/quality/check-external-integrations.test.mjs`: PASS, 50 tests. `corepack pnpm --filter @salary-hijacking/types run build`: PASS. `corepack pnpm run check:package-manager-scripts`: PASS, 13 package files checked. `corepack pnpm run build`: PASS, 12 Turbo tasks. | GitHub Actions CodeQL `javascript-typescript` failed on commit `6e78ceaf...` before analysis because nested package scripts invoking `corepack pnpm` could fall through to network Corepack and terminate during `@salary-hijacking/types#build`. The shim now prefers the Corepack cache when present and otherwise reuses the already installed `pnpm` from `pnpm/action-setup` before attempting network Corepack. This does not replace CodeQL's hosted verification; it makes the pre-build path deterministic enough for the next CI run. |

GREEN after adding root `wrangler`, Worker-specific production/dry-run deploy scripts, and a package-manager guard that rejects `npx wrangler deploy` root deployment. `node --test scripts\quality\check-package-manager-scripts.test.mjs`: PASS, 9 tests. `corepack pnpm run check:package-manager-scripts`: PASS. `corepack pnpm exec wrangler --version`: PASS, `4.107.0`. `corepack pnpm run deploy:cloudflare-workers:dry-run`: PASS for API, notifications, and scheduler production configs. `corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`: PASS. `corepack pnpm run check:external-integrations`: PASS with local `gh`/Neon CLI availability warnings. `corepack pnpm run format:check`: PASS. `corepack pnpm run release:preflight`: PASS, READY with local-change/CLI warnings before commit. `corepack pnpm run build`: PASS, 12 Turbo tasks. Cloudflare API build trigger update: PASS, API connected build deploy command changed to `pnpm run deploy:cloudflare-api`. Cloudflare manual API build `c7969862-5266-456b-9291-efbf91529685`: PASS, status `stopped`, outcome `success`, commit `a58efb37a4500d2ebb1211a9ef9a0a602fa93d8a`, no `wrangler: not found`, no Worker name mismatch warning. | Cloudflare connected repository deploy commands must be Worker-specific: API uses `pnpm run deploy:cloudflare-api`, notifications uses `pnpm run deploy:cloudflare-notifications`, and scheduler uses `pnpm run deploy:cloudflare-scheduler`. The aggregate `pnpm run deploy:cloudflare-workers` is retained for local or neutral CI deployment, not for a Worker-specific connected build because Cloudflare overrides mismatched Worker names inside that build context. Creating notifications/scheduler connected build configs through the API was blocked by Cloudflare error `12044` Workers Previews access; configure those two Worker connected builds in the dashboard when that account capability is available. Secret values were not requested, printed, or committed. |
